items.title: [负面] Since Morimens disclosed whether AI/Machine transl...
items.summary:
Since Morimens disclosed whether AI/Machine translattion was used in your language I was surprised and disappointed to discover there is AI generated images used as well with 0 disclosure. I ignored numerous mild flags until it was blatantly AI (like Nautilia's nonsensical 'tentacles' that merge into eachother, begin and end in unnatural ways, random hair like projections in spots they shouldn't be, seperate cords having random smaller projections connecting them together in odd areas that are, again, nonsensical. 

Now I'm assuming all the mild AI flags I've deliberately ignored to give the benefit of the doubt are AI as well... undisclosed AI. 

The story and concept are actually good so to see the game cheapened like this alongside the dishonesty leaves a sour taste. Can't recommend now.

items.title: [负面] Very decent game that I can't recommend at the cur...
items.summary:
Very decent game that I can't recommend at the current time.
Every stage is pretty much a mini roguelite where you collect relics and power up your party's cards, and then you fight the final boss.
The different factions and synergies were pretty interesting.
There even is a pvp mode where each character has a different card for this mode.
The devs are also pretty generous with pulls.

As for the negative points, only the prologue has any voice acting, aside from combat.
The story was unreadable to me, because the text were very obviously machine-translated and did not make any sense.
The skill cards and mechanics are also machine translated and were inconsistent in some places.
I couldn't get invested in the story or character, since I had no idea what was going on, and the bosses were starting to get unreasonably hard, so I just dipped, would not recommend unless they actually get human translation for everything.

items.title: [正面] When I first downloaded this game I wan't expectin...
items.summary:
When I first downloaded this game I wan't expecting anything amazing, but I'm glad I was wrong!

This game is great and scratches that card game itch I keep having. The game is similar to other card games on Steam (mainly Slay the Spire), but it adds progression and gacha mechanics into the mix. The game doesn't feel overly monetized or pay to win though, as I've had a very nice f2p experience, and have been able to progress at a pretty good rate. 

The art and the feel of the game are also very good plus the game also just always has something to do. So I definitively recommend trying this game if you like card games, especially since it's free!

items.title: [正面] Absolute peak. 10/10, perfect, amazing, wonderful,...
items.summary:
Absolute peak. 10/10, perfect, amazing, wonderful, genuinely one of my favorite games.

The art is absolutely stunning with music to match. The gameplay is fun and complex without being overwhelming. The stories will in fact grip your heart, organs, and whatever else you have in there. 

And the gacha? I hesitate to even call it that. Cuz like wdym I can get 90% of the characters without spending a dime. They practically throw premium currency at you any chance they get. Redeem codes practically fly out of the wazoo. They don't pressure you to spend money every 3 seconds. There's still incentives to do so, but not something that feels like it's trying to scurry into your wallet.

The characters are a wonderful variety of female, male, strange, unique, and interesting. We got dommy mommies, we got gilf's, we got a gambling wolf, we got a guy who wants to eat our corpse, we got adorable kids to adopt, and cthluhu's just kinda chilling with us. 

So like, play the game already. Stop reading. Go. GO NOW. DOWNLOAD. PLAY. PLAY IT NOW.

items.title: [正面] Very easy recommend for a spooky card game. There'...
items.summary:
Very easy recommend for a spooky card game. There's a lot of depth and builds you can make and there's every aspect of this game is fun.

It's gatcha but there's so much free stuff that you will probably get everything as a F2P within a few months.
